allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Id 34424 -Force; Get-Process WINWORD -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process WINWORD -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -PassThru | Select-Object Id, ProcessName")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process WINWORD -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Id, ProcessName -Auto")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process WINWORD -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, MainWindowTitle | Format-Table -Auto")
